strengths: 20 years of continuous hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably clears the 15-year minimum
Genuine entrepreneurial track record: founded and maintains GISCollective, shipped multiple open-source libraries, demonstrated ability to build and own products end-to-end
Recent builder-level exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing active engagement with the agentic AI space
concerns: Career ceiling is Staff/Senior Developer — no evidence of Director-level IC scope, executive influence, strategic advisory work, or organizational thought leadership
AI expertise is shallow and very recent (role started April 2025); no demonstrated AI products at scale, no published research, no recognized external standing in the AI field
Cloud experience is incidental — AWS CDK used within one team, Kubernetes for a personal OSS project — not the platform-level cloud architecture depth the role requires
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically credible, multi-disciplinary engineer with genuine builder instincts and entrepreneurial energy, but this role is a Director-level IC position requiring recognized AI expertise, enterprise advisory credibility, and the ability to shape cloud and AI strategy at organizational scale. His highest titles are Staff and Senior Developer, his AI work is approximately two months old and implementation-scoped, and there is no evidence of executive-level influence, strategic customer advisory relationships, conference keynotes, or published work that would signal readiness for a principal-level AI strategy role. The breadth of his technical background and his OSS founding work are real positives, but they do not close the seniority and domain-depth gap at the core of this role.
